items.title: ‘Sock-er’ News: Arsenal Donates Old Football Socks to Sick Horses and Donkeys
items.summary: Socks are the pinnacle of lousy gifts—used socks so much the worse—but for these horses and donkeys they’re every child’s dream. That’s because these fancy red socks were donated by the players of the…
